$description: Component tokens for Mobile Avatar Mask — a semi-transparent dark circular overlay rendered on top of the avatar image during interaction (hover state). Provides a dimming effect to signal interactivity and make the action icon legible. Matches the avatar container shape and size exactly. Figma Reference: Node ID 367-6757

$component.name: Avatar Mask
$component.description: A full-coverage circular dark overlay that appears on top of the avatar image when the avatar enters its hover/interactive state. The mask fills the entire avatar container and is applied at 60% opacity, creating a consistent darkening effect regardless of the underlying photo or color. Paired with the Avatar Action Icon which renders above this mask.
$component.structure: Single absolutely-positioned div covering the full avatar container (inset: 0). Always circular. Applied as an overlay layer between the avatar image and the action icon.

usage.contexts: Used exclusively inside the Avatar component when state=Hover and actionIcon=True. Not used standalone.
usage.features: Full-cover circular overlay, 60% opacity darkening, size matches parent avatar

size.$comment: Mask dimensions per avatar size — width and height are equal (square, rendered circular via border-radius)

xs.description: Mobile avatar mask size for xs avatar - 24px

sm.description: Mobile avatar mask size for sm avatar - 32px

md.description: Mobile avatar mask size for md avatar - 40px

lg.description: Mobile avatar mask size for lg avatar - 48px

xl.description: Mobile avatar mask size for xl avatar - 56px

2xl.description: Mobile avatar mask size for 2xl avatar - 64px

radius.description: Mobile avatar mask border radius - fully circular pill at all sizes (matches avatar rounded=True shape)

color.description: Mobile avatar mask overlay color - dark gray #434343 applied at 60% opacity (no semantic token exists for this specific overlay color)

opacity.description: Mobile avatar mask opacity - 60% — dims the avatar image enough to make the action icon visible while still showing the photo beneath
